Truly Relaxing and Authentic Environment
Who Wanna Pho is where innovation meets tradition. As the world’s first Vietnamese cuisine and lounge pairing authentic pho with hookah, we’re redefining flavor and relaxation. Every bowl is a labor of love, every puff a moment of magic—served with soul in a vibe all our own.
Book now
Our Lounge
Spend the Perfect Time with Friends Pho-Life!
Celebrate life’s special milestones with Who Wanna Pho—book our lounge and treat yourself to an unforgettable fusion of authentic Vietnamese pho and hookah vibes. It’s more than a night out; it’s a sensory escape, crafted with love and brimming with soul. Don’t just mark the moment—make it extraordinary with an experience that’s truly one-of-a-kind!

This was an awesome find! The best Pho that I have ever had…
I had seen this place online, as an option for dinner before a show at The Variety Theater. When I walked by, I hesitated, as they have hookahs for patrons, with their meal. I decided it was worth it, and I could not smell smoke at all, despite people smoking hookahs at two tables nearby. The food was fantastic! I had the vegan Pho and the fried tofu, pickled carrots and fresh veggies and noodles were amazing. The service was even better – timely, attentive, friendly. My server suggested a cocktail with some substitutions, and it was great. Highly recommend.
Amy H.
Review from Trip Advisor

meta.meta_description: Who Wanna Pho is the world's first Vietnamese cuisine and lounge, offering authentic pho and a one-of-a-kind hookah experience. Visit us for a modern twist on traditional Vietnamese dining. Catering available!
